member.name: M:NHSCapacityAndDemandPlanner.HomeWindow.button1_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Opens scheduler window

member.name: M:NHSCapacityAndDemandPlanner.HomeWindow.panel1_Paint(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: ==================================================================================================================================================== I want to make this so that when the button 3 is clicked, it shows the panel and it takes the size of the text that is inside of it. If there are no notifications, there will be text in the pannel saying no notifications. This will be set up with an alert system that will be on every window as will the notification centre. It does not need to be done until later tho. ===================================================================================================================================================
